name: Xetulul Theme Park
description: Xetulul is a theme park in Guatemala.  It is located in the Retalhuleu Department in the southwest of the country.  Opening in 2002, Xetulul is the third-largest amusement park in Latin America, after Beto Carrero World in Penha, Santa Catarina, Brazil and Six Flags México near Mexico City, Mexico.
imageAttribution: View of the Xetulul Theme Park
